page: Microsoft Azure M416s_10_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 family. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server is configured with 9496.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 22.83 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable for external storage attachments. It does not feature any onboard GPUs and includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the massive memory allocation and high core count, this server represents an enterprise-class resource tier designed for extreme scale. The qualitative cost profile reflects its position as a highly specialized, resource-dense platform. It is engineered for workloads requiring massive memory footprints, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure M416s_10_v3 is a highly specialized, memory-optimized server from the MSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors, it features 416 dedicated vCPUs and a massive 9496.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 22.83 GB of memory per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, and it contains no onboard GPUs. This server is designed for enterprise-scale workloads that demand extreme memory capacity and substantial compute resources. It is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases, massive data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems that require extensive memory footprints.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_10_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 9496.0 GB of RAM, designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_10_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 9496.0 GB of RAM on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: An ultra-high-memory enterprise instance featuring four hundred sixteen dedicated cores and nearly nine and a half terabytes of system RAM.

9496.0 GB of system memory providing 22.83 GB per vCPU
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included

Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
